summary: GATE Acceptance Tests v138 - All 9 GATE criteria verified. 11/12 backend tests passed (1 minor test issue). Frontend UI verified via Playwright for admin orders, vendor orders, and customer invoices/orders.

minor.issue: Test requires customer_id query param - test script issue, not API issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: All GATE acceptance criteria verified and passing. The surgical patch for customer/payer separation is working correctly.

GATE-CUSTOMER-1.details: CartDrawerCompleteFlow.jsx prefills payer_name from customer account (invoice_client_name or client_name) with read-only display and 'Change' button. Code verified at lines 74-81 and 344-352.

GATE-CUSTOMER-2.details: Customer invoice table at /account/invoices shows PAYER NAME column with real payer names (Moses, Mac, Suwena, John, Mac Geofrey, Federica, etc.) - NOT same as customer_name.

GATE-CUSTOMER-3.details: Customer order drawer shows real assigned sales contact (e.g., Janeth Msuya, +255710000001, janeth.sales@konekt.demo) with Call and Email buttons. No 'Konekt Sales Team' placeholder.

GATE-ADMIN-1.details: Admin invoice list at /api/admin/invoices/list returns customer_name and payer_name as SEPARATE distinct fields. 117 invoices tested, 47 with both fields populated.

GATE-ADMIN-2.details: Admin orders at /api/admin/orders-ops returns all required fields: customer_name, payer_name, sales_name, vendor_name, approved_by, approved_at.

GATE-ADMIN-3.details: Admin orders table UI shows separate columns: Customer, Payer, Assigned Sales, Assigned Vendor, Approved By. Order drawer shows Payment section with Payer Name and Approved By fields.

GATE-VENDOR-1.details: Vendor orders at /api/vendor/orders returns vendor-safe fields only (vendor_order_no, base_price, status, sales_name, sales_phone, sales_email). NO customer identity fields (customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone).

GATE-VENDOR-2.details: Vendor orders UI at /partner/orders shows only: Date, Vendor Order No, Source Type, Base Price, Status, Priority. NO Customer column - privacy protected.

GATE-SEPARATION.details: Verified in admin invoices/orders. Most records have distinct customer_name and payer_name values. Only 3 legacy invoices and 2 legacy orders have matching values (test data created before the fix).

screenshots: .screenshots/admin_orders_table.png - Admin orders table with Customer, Payer, Approved By columns
.screenshots/admin_order_drawer.png - Admin order drawer with Payment section showing Payer Name
.screenshots/vendor_orders_table.png - Vendor orders table with NO Customer column
.screenshots/customer_invoices.png - Customer invoices table with PAYER NAME column
.screenshots/customer_order_drawer.png - Customer order drawer with real sales contact
